next_manual_steps: Create private GitHub repository for opportunity-lab

Enable branch protection for main branch
Set GitHub Pages or Vercel project root to projects/opportunity-lab/
Initial commit: Create first feature branch, push, open PR
Configure nightly cron for Opportunity Engine runs
